_note: This schema uses the human-friendly format (name, options as array, updateSemantics, tags). The API also accepts the native format (propertyName, options as string, update as boolean). Both are auto-normalized on save.
name: Pulse — Agent Activity
description: Pre-defined collection for autonomous AI agent activity. Captures tasks, decisions, logs, notes, alerts, and monitors generated during proactive agent operations (heartbeat). Designed as an append-only audit trail with selective mutability.

properties.name: Tasks
properties.description: Action items created or updated by the agent. Each task is an object: { title, description, status (pending | in_progress | completed | cancelled), owner (agent or user ID), assignedBy, priority (low | medium | high | urgent), dueDate (ISO 8601), completedAt, outcome }. Agents append new tasks and update status on existing ones.

properties.name: AI Log
properties.description: Immutable record of what the agent checked or did. Each log is an object: { event (heartbeat_check | action_taken | error | decision), summary (one-line description), details (full context), trigger (scheduled | event | user_request), status (ok | acted | flagged | error | skipped), agentId, references (array of related memory IDs) }. Never update existing logs — append only.

properties.name: AI Note
properties.description: Point-in-time observations and insights derived by the agent. Each note is an object: { title, content, category (insight | observation | user_preference | pattern), confidence (low | medium | high), source (derived | stated | observed), references (array of related log or memory IDs) }. If an insight evolves, write a new note — do not overwrite.

properties.name: Alerts
properties.description: Notifications requiring human attention. Each alert is an object: { title, severity (info | warning | critical), category (anomaly | threshold | reminder | escalation), message, status (open | acknowledged | resolved | dismissed), acknowledgedBy (user ID or null), resolvedAt (ISO 8601 or null) }. Agents create alerts; humans acknowledge or dismiss them.

properties.name: Decisions
properties.description: Record of autonomous agent decisions with full reasoning. Each decision is an object: { question (what was being decided), decision (chosen action), reasoning (why this choice), alternatives (array of other options considered), confidence (low | medium | high), autonomous (boolean — true if agent decided alone), approvedBy (user ID or null) }. Immutable — provides the explainability layer for governance.

properties.name: Monitors
properties.description: Persistent watchlist items the agent checks on each pulse. Each monitor is an object: { target (what to watch, e.g. 'CRM pipeline > $2M'), description, type (threshold | change_detection | schedule), frequency (every_pulse | daily | weekly), status (active | paused | retired), lastChecked (ISO 8601), lastResult (ok | triggered | error) }. Agents update status and lastChecked on each pulse cycle.
